caption: 🏋️‍♀️ Did you know strength training can rebuild aging bones? 🦴 At 60+, it's not just about cardio. 💡 Here are 5 science-backed facts: 1) Resistance exercises increase bone density by 10-15% in 6 months, 2) Progressive overload stimulates osteoblasts, 3) High-intensity interval training (HIIT) improves bone health in older adults, 4) Strength training reduces fracture risk by 50%, and 5) It's never too late to start - even at 80, strength training can still improve bone health. 💪 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget - your future body will thank you 🙏 #bonehealth #strengthtraining #agingwell #fitnessover60 #healthyliving
